tools.notes: Managed install is blocked until release packaging provides a verified HTTPS archive and sha256.
tools.licenseNote: Package according to the upstream Solana license.

tools.notes: Prefer a verified prebuilt binary. Building through Cargo is a tooling install risk and must stay explicitly approved.
tools.licenseNote: Package according to the upstream Anchor license.

tools.notes: Managed Rust packaging requires verified archives; no bootstrap script execution is allowed.
tools.licenseNote: Package according to upstream Rust license terms.

tools.notes: Cargo is resolved as part of a verified Rust toolchain package.
tools.licenseNote: Package according to upstream Rust license terms.

tools.notes: Managed Node packaging requires a verified archive and sha256.
tools.licenseNote: Package according to upstream Node.js license terms.

tools.notes: npm is resolved as part of a verified Node toolchain package.
tools.licenseNote: Package according to upstream npm license terms.

tools.notes: D2 prefers validated system Git and does not package managed Git by default.
tools.licenseNote: Use system Git or package according to upstream Git license terms.
